productDisplayName: Murcia Women Laser Cut Brown Handbag
description: Crafted by skilled Indian craftsmen, murcia bags use the finest materials and hardware in their products. This stylishly silhouetted bag embodies the essence of the modern Indian woman - unapologetically fashionable. This bag with its two tone leather upper and elegant bronze hardware adds a stylish spin to your off-duty ensembles. Referencing the  retro-esque sequin detailing, expand your bag collection with this accessory. Two tone leatherette upper patterned cut outs on the front, under a sequinned liningMetal ring detailing on the sidesOne strapOne main compartment with a zippered pocket and a pouchZippered pocket on the backBag careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
